generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While politicians debate civil defense budgets, communities like yours are already stepping up! Local groups across the country are organizing preparedness workshops that cost a fraction of what Washington wastes. Why spend billions on bureaucracy when neighbors can protect each other? #CommunityFirst #SmartSecurity
